arts.ttl: Kieran McKenna points out what Aston Villa 'resorted to' against Ipswich
arts.sum: Ipswich Town boss Kieran McKenna was pleased by his team's performance against Aston Villa at Portman Road on Sunday - so much so that the newly promoted Tractor Boys reduced Villa to going long for much of the game. McKenna, who has guided Ipswich to four draws on the trot at the beginning of this Premier League season, was delighted that his players were able to make Champions League Villa so uncomfortable for much of the afternoon and left them going more directly in their approach than they might otherwise have liked.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery points out new Aston Villa reality as Bayern Munich rest up
arts.sum: Unai Emery insists Aston Villa have no grounds to moan about Bayern Munich having more recovery time ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash at Villa Park. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa thwarted by resilient Ipswich on last pit-stop before Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: IPSWICH 2-2 ASTON VILLA: Liam Delap's goal rescued a point for the Tractor Boys but bigger things loom for Aston Villa, who face Bayern Munich in the Champions League this week

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sets Arsenal and Liverpool target as Aston Villa prepare for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Aston Villa will welcome Bayern Munich to Villa Park in the Champions League next week, with manager Unai Emery having high ambitions for this team

arts.ttl: Diego Carlos was 'terrorised' by Liam Delap as Aston Villa drop points at Ipswich
arts.sum: Delap, though, earned Town a deserved point after an impressive second half performance in which he consistently got the better of Villa centre half Diego Carlos. Aston Villa were held to a 2-2 draw by newly promoted Ipswich Town at Portman Road on Sunday at the beginning of a three-game week in which they also welcome Bayern Munich and Manchester United to Villa Park.

arts.ttl: 'We always back ourselves at Portman Road' - McKenna on 2-2 draw with Aston Villa
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: "Of course we want to get as many points as we can, but to compete as we did against a team of the calibre that Aston Villa are, a team with great familiarity working under a very good manager, is a big, big positive. Reflecting further on the game, he said: "The goals (against), of course, were a set-back because we'd put ourselves in a good position in the game.

arts.ttl: 'Like we planned' - Unai Emery delivers verdict on Aston Villa draw at Ipswich Town - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Unai Emery thought Aston Villa's 2-2 draw with Ipswich Town was a fair result as his side's 100 per cent record on the road this season came to an end at Portman Road. "The result is fair and we are in a process as a team working out how we can build strongly our tactics and mentality with some new players getting progressively better," Emery said.

arts.ttl: Premier League match report: Ipswich Town 2-2 Aston Villa
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Delap's second goal got Ipswich back on level terms (Image: Steve Waller) Phillips' resulting corner was caught by the goalkeeper before the ball was played up the pitch, where former Aston Villa defender Tuanzebe was forced to bring down Tielemans to prevent an overload, picking up Town's third booking of the afternoon.

arts.ttl: Delap double earns Ipswich draw with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Ipswich Town drew 2-2 with Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday, as Liam Delap scored a brace for the home side at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Ipswich 2-2 Aston Villa: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Delap nets a brace
arts.sum: Liam Delap scores twice as Ipswich Town draw 2-2 with Aston Villa in Sunday's Premier League contest at Portman Road.
